content.json:
UniFi Site Manager
Site health, device inventory, ISP performance and security posture across all UniFi-managed sites. Polled every 5 minutes from the Site Manager API. Scope every panel with the time range and site filters below.

parameters.name: SiteFilter
parameters.label: Sites
parameters.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name)
  ) on $left.hostId == $right.hostId
| project value=tostring(siteId), label=coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| order by label asc

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Title startswith 'UniFi'
| summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status != 'Closed'
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedTime)
| project Severity, ['Incident #']=IncidentNumber, Title, Status, ['Alerts']=array_length(AlertIds), Opened=CreatedTime, ['Last update']=LastModifiedTime, ['Age (d)']=AgeDays
| order by Severity asc, Opened desc
content.title: Open UniFi-related Sentinel incidents

content.query:
let base = Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | extend Total = toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice),
             Offline = toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice),
             Critical = toint(siteStatistics.counts.criticalNotification),
             Pending = toint(siteStatistics.counts.pendingUpdateDevice),
             WiFi = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wifiClient),
             Wired = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wiredClient);
union
  (base | summarize V=count()                   | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Sites monitored",  Order=1),
  (base | summarize V=sum(Total) - sum(Offline) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Devices online",   Order=2),
  (base | summarize V=sum(Offline)              | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Devices offline",  Order=3),
  (base | summarize V=sum(Critical)             | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Critical alerts",  Order=4),
  (base | summarize V=sum(Pending)              | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Firmware pending", Order=5),
  (base | summarize V=sum(WiFi) + sum(Wired)    | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Active clients",   Order=6)
| project Order, Metric, Value=V
| order by Order asc
| project Metric, Value

let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend Offline = toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice),
         Total = toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice),
         WanUptime = todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime),
         Critical = toint(siteStatistics.counts.criticalNotification),
         Pending = toint(siteStatistics.counts.pendingUpdateDevice),
         Ips = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode),
         Isp = tostring(siteStatistics.ispInfo.name),
         InternetIssues = array_length(parse_json(tostring(siteStatistics.internetIssues)))
| extend Severity = case(
    Offline > 0 or Critical > 0 or WanUptime < 95, "Critical",
    Pending > 0 or WanUptime < 99 or InternetIssues > 0, "Warning",
    "Healthy")
| where Severity != "Healthy"
| project Severity, Site, Offline, ['Total devices']=Total, ['WAN uptime %']=WanUptime, Critical, ['Pending firmware']=Pending, ['Internet issues']=InternetIssues, ISP=Isp, IPS=Ips
| order by Severity asc, Offline desc, ['WAN uptime %'] asc
content.title: Sites with active issues (sorted by severity)

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend Total = toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice),
         Offline = toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice)
| summarize Online=sum(Total)-sum(Offline), Offline=sum(Offline) by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Devices online across estate

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend WanUptime = todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime)
| summarize WanUptime = avg(WanUptime) by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m), Site
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: WAN uptime % per site

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend ['WAN IP'] = tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp),
         ISP = tostring(siteStatistics.ispInfo.name),
         ASN = toint(siteStatistics.ispInfo.asn)
| project Site, ['WAN IP'], ISP, ASN
| order by Site asc
content.title: WAN external IPs per site (latest)

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
let base = Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| mv-expand issue = todynamic(tostring(siteStatistics.internetIssues))
| where isnotempty(issue)
| extend AvgMs = toint(issue.latencyAvgMs),
         PeakMs = toint(issue.latencyMaxMs),
         HighLatency = tobool(issue.highLatency),
         Downtime = tobool(issue.wanDowntime)
| extend IssueType = case(
    HighLatency and Downtime, 'Latency + downtime',
    Downtime, 'WAN downtime',
    HighLatency, 'High latency',
    'Other'),
    Severity = case(
        PeakMs > 5000, 'Critical',
        Downtime, 'Severe',
        PeakMs > 1000, 'Severe',
        HighLatency, 'Warning',
        'Info');
union
  (base | summarize V=count()                                | extend V=todouble(V), Metric='Total issues',        Order=1),
  (base | summarize V=countif(Downtime)                      | extend V=todouble(V), Metric='Outages',             Order=2),
  (base | summarize V=countif(HighLatency and not(Downtime)) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric='High-latency events', Order=3),
  (base | summarize V=countif(Severity == 'Critical')        | extend V=todouble(V), Metric='Critical',            Order=4),
  (base | distinct Site | summarize V=count()                | extend V=todouble(V), Metric='Sites affected',      Order=5)
| project Order, Metric, Value=V
| order by Order asc
| project Metric, Value

let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| mv-expand issue = todynamic(tostring(siteStatistics.internetIssues))
| where isnotempty(issue)
| extend AvgMs = toint(issue.latencyAvgMs),
         PeakMs = toint(issue.latencyMaxMs),
         HighLatency = tobool(issue.highLatency),
         Downtime = tobool(issue.wanDowntime)
| extend IssueType = case(
    HighLatency and Downtime, 'Latency + downtime',
    Downtime, 'WAN downtime',
    HighLatency, 'High latency',
    'Other'),
    Severity = case(
        PeakMs > 5000, 'Critical',
        Downtime, 'Severe',
        PeakMs > 1000, 'Severe',
        HighLatency, 'Warning',
        'Info')
| summarize Issues=count() by Site
| order by Issues desc
content.title: Issues per site

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| mv-expand issue = todynamic(tostring(siteStatistics.internetIssues))
| where isnotempty(issue)
| extend AvgMs = toint(issue.latencyAvgMs),
         PeakMs = toint(issue.latencyMaxMs),
         HighLatency = tobool(issue.highLatency),
         Downtime = tobool(issue.wanDowntime)
| extend IssueType = case(
    HighLatency and Downtime, 'Latency + downtime',
    Downtime, 'WAN downtime',
    HighLatency, 'High latency',
    'Other'),
    Severity = case(
        PeakMs > 5000, 'Critical',
        Downtime, 'Severe',
        PeakMs > 1000, 'Severe',
        HighLatency, 'Warning',
        'Info')
| summarize Count=count() by IssueType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Issues by type

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| mv-expand issue = todynamic(tostring(siteStatistics.internetIssues))
| where isnotempty(issue)
| extend AvgMs = toint(issue.latencyAvgMs),
         PeakMs = toint(issue.latencyMaxMs),
         HighLatency = tobool(issue.highLatency),
         Downtime = tobool(issue.wanDowntime)
| extend IssueType = case(
    HighLatency and Downtime, 'Latency + downtime',
    Downtime, 'WAN downtime',
    HighLatency, 'High latency',
    'Other'),
    Severity = case(
        PeakMs > 5000, 'Critical',
        Downtime, 'Severe',
        PeakMs > 1000, 'Severe',
        HighLatency, 'Warning',
        'Info')
| extend SortRank = case(
    PeakMs > 5000, 1,
    Downtime, 2,
    PeakMs > 1000, 3,
    HighLatency, 4,
    5)
| project SortRank, Severity, Site, IssueType, ['Avg latency (ms)']=AvgMs, ['Peak latency (ms)']=PeakMs
| order by SortRank asc, ['Peak latency (ms)'] desc
| project-away SortRank
content.title: Internet issues (sorted by severity)

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend Gateway = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.shortname),
         IPS = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode),
         ['IPS rules'] = toint(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsSignature.rulesCount),
         ISP = tostring(siteStatistics.ispInfo.name),
         ['External IP'] = tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp),
         ['WAN uptime %'] = todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime),
         ['TX retry %'] = todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.txRetry),
         ['Total devices'] = toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice),
         ['Offline'] = toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice),
         ['WiFi clients'] = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wifiClient),
         ['Wired clients'] = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wiredClient)
| project Site, Gateway, IPS, ['IPS rules'], ISP, ['External IP'], ['WAN uptime %'], ['TX retry %'], ['Total devices'], ['Offline'], ['WiFi clients'], ['Wired clients']
| order by Site asc
content.title: Latest snapshot per site

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend WiFi = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wifiDevice),
         Wired = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wiredDevice),
         Gateway = toint(siteStatistics.counts.gatewayDevice)
| project Site, WiFi, Wired, Gateway
content.title: Network vs Protect device counts

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend WiFi = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wifiClient),
         Wired = toint(siteStatistics.counts.wiredClient),
         Guest = toint(siteStatistics.counts.guestClient)
| project Site, WiFi, Wired, Guest
content.title: Client mix (WiFi / Wired / Guest)

content.json: WiFi quality & WAN IP history

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend TxRetry = todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.txRetry)
| summarize ['TX retry %'] = avg(TxRetry) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Site
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: TX retry % over time (WiFi health)

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend ['WAN IP'] = tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp)
| where isnotempty(['WAN IP'])
| summarize ['First seen'] = min(TimeGenerated), ['Last seen'] = max(TimeGenerated) by Site, ['WAN IP']
| order by Site asc, ['First seen'] asc
content.title: WAN external IP changes (last 30d)

content.query:
let base = Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | mv-expand period = periods
    | extend AvgLatency = todouble(period.data.wan.avgLatency),
             MaxLatency = todouble(period.data.wan.maxLatency),
             PacketLoss = todouble(period.data.wan.packetLoss),
             Downtime = todouble(period.data.wan.downtime),
             Uptime = todouble(period.data.wan.uptime);
union
  (base | summarize V=round(avg(AvgLatency),1) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Avg latency (ms)",    Order=1),
  (base | summarize V=round(max(MaxLatency),0) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Peak latency (ms)",   Order=2),
  (base | summarize V=round(avg(PacketLoss),2) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Avg packet loss %",   Order=3),
  (base | summarize V=sum(Downtime)            | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Total downtime (s)",  Order=4),
  (base | summarize V=round(avg(Uptime),2)     | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Avg uptime %",        Order=5),
  (base | summarize V=count()                  | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Samples",             Order=6)
| project Order, Metric, Value=V
| order by Order asc
| project Metric, Value

let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand period = periods
| extend MetricTime = todatetime(period.metricTime),
         AvgLatency = todouble(period.data.wan.avgLatency),
         MaxLatency = todouble(period.data.wan.maxLatency)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | project siteId=tostring(siteId), Site=tostring(meta.name)
  ) on siteId
| summarize ['Avg ms']=avg(AvgLatency), ['Peak ms']=max(MaxLatency) by bin(MetricTime, 1h), Site
| order by MetricTime asc
content.title: Latency trend (avg + peak) per site

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand period = periods
| extend MetricTime = todatetime(period.metricTime),
         PacketLoss = todouble(period.data.wan.packetLoss)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | project siteId=tostring(siteId), Site=tostring(meta.name)
  ) on siteId
| summarize ['Packet loss %']=avg(PacketLoss) by bin(MetricTime, 1h), Site
| order by MetricTime asc
content.title: Packet loss % per site

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand period = periods
| extend MetricTime = todatetime(period.metricTime),
         DownKbps = todouble(period.data.wan.download_kbps),
         UpKbps = todouble(period.data.wan.upload_kbps)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | project siteId=tostring(siteId), Site=tostring(meta.name)
  ) on siteId
| summarize Down=avg(DownKbps), Up=avg(UpKbps) by bin(MetricTime, 1h), Site
| order by MetricTime asc
content.title: WAN throughput (down/up kbps)

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand period = periods
| extend Uptime = todouble(period.data.wan.uptime)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | project siteId=tostring(siteId), Site=tostring(meta.name)
  ) on siteId
| summarize ['Avg uptime %']=avg(Uptime), Samples=count() by Site
| order by ['Avg uptime %'] asc
content.title: WAN uptime rollup (last 30d) per site

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand period = periods
| extend ['Period'] = todatetime(period.metricTime),
         ['Downtime (s)'] = todouble(period.data.wan.downtime),
         ['Uptime %'] = todouble(period.data.wan.uptime),
         ISP = tostring(period.data.wan.ispName)
| where ['Downtime (s)'] > 0
| join kind=leftouter (
    Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | project siteId=tostring(siteId), Site=tostring(meta.name)
  ) on siteId
| project ['Period'], Site, ISP, ['Downtime (s)'], ['Uptime %']
| order by ['Period'] desc
content.title: WAN downtime events recorded

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| extend HasWAN2 = isnotempty(tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN2))
| where HasWAN2
| extend ['WAN2 IP']     = tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN2.externalIp),
         ['WAN2 uptime'] = todouble(siteStatistics.wans.WAN2.wanUptime),
         ['WAN2 issues'] = array_length(parse_json(tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN2.wanIssues))),
         ['WAN IP']      = tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp),
         ['WAN uptime']  = todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime)
| project Site, ['WAN IP'], ['WAN uptime'], ['WAN2 IP'], ['WAN2 uptime'], ['WAN2 issues']
| order by ['WAN2 uptime'] asc
content.title: Multi-WAN sites — WAN2 (secondary) status

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), 'Unknown')
| where isnotempty(tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN2))
| mv-expand issue = todynamic(tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN2.wanIssues))
| where isnotempty(issue)
| extend ['Issue index'] = tolong(issue.index),
         ['Count']       = toint(coalesce(issue.count, 1)),
         ['Downtime']    = tobool(issue.wanDowntime),
         ['High latency']= tobool(issue.highLatency),
         ['Peak ms']     = toint(issue.latencyMaxMs)
| project Site, ['Issue index'], Count, ['Downtime'], ['High latency'], ['Peak ms']
| order by Count desc, ['Issue index'] desc
content.title: WAN2 issue index detail

content.query:
let base = Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id;
union
  (base | summarize V=count()                                                        | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Total devices",   Order=1),
  (base | summarize V=countif(status =~ "online")                                    | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Online",          Order=2),
  (base | summarize V=countif(status =~ "offline")                                   | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Offline",         Order=3),
  (base | summarize V=countif(productLine =~ "network")                              | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Network devices", Order=4),
  (base | summarize V=countif(productLine =~ "protect")                              | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Protect devices", Order=5),
  (base | summarize V=countif(firmwareStatus in ("updateAvailable","updatePending")) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Need firmware",   Order=6)
| project Order, Metric, Value=V
| order by Order asc
| project Metric, Value

Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Count=count() by ProductLine = productLine
content.title: Devices by product line

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Count=count() by Status = status
content.title: Online vs Offline

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Count=count() by FirmwareStatus = firmwareStatus
content.title: Firmware status

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    ['Up to date']  = countif(firmwareStatus =~ "upToDate"),
    ['Update available'] = countif(firmwareStatus =~ "updateAvailable"),
    ['Update pending']   = countif(firmwareStatus =~ "updatePending")
    by Model = model, ['Product line'] = productLine
| extend ['Drift %'] = round(100.0 * (['Update available'] + ['Update pending']) / Total, 1)
| order by ['Drift %'] desc, Total desc
content.title: Firmware drift breakdown

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| project Name=name, Model=model, ['Product line']=productLine, Status=status,
          IP=ip, MAC=mac, Version=version, FirmwareStatus=firmwareStatus,
          ['Update available']=updateAvailable, Console=isConsole,
          Adopted=adoptionTime, ['Last started']=startupTime
| order by Status asc, ['Product line'] asc, Name asc
content.title: All devices (filterable)

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| where status =~ "offline"
| project Name=name, Model=model, ['Product line']=productLine,
          IP=ip, MAC=mac, ['Last seen']=TimeGenerated, Adopted=adoptionTime
| order by ['Last seen'] desc
content.title: Offline devices

content.query:
let sites = Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | extend Ips = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode);
let devices = Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id;
union
  (sites   | summarize V=countif(Ips == "ips")                                                                       | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="IPS enforcing",         Order=1),
  (sites   | summarize V=countif(Ips == "ids")                                                                       | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="IPS IDS-only",          Order=2),
  (sites   | summarize V=countif(Ips == "off")                                                                       | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="IPS disabled",          Order=3),
  (devices | summarize V=countif(firmwareStatus in ("updateAvailable","updatePending"))                              | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="Firmware exposure",     Order=4),
  (Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize V=dcount(tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp)) | extend V=todouble(V), Metric="WAN IPs (7d distinct)", Order=5)
| project Order, Metric, Value=V
| order by Order asc
| project Metric, Value

let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend IPS = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode),
         ['IPS rules'] = toint(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsSignature.rulesCount),
         Inspection = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.inspectionState),
         Gateway = tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.shortname)
| project Site, Gateway, IPS, ['IPS rules'], Inspection
| order by IPS asc
content.title: IPS status per site

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| where firmwareStatus in ("updateAvailable", "updatePending")
| project Name=name, Model=model, ['Product line']=productLine, ['Current']=version, ['Available']=updateAvailable, Status=firmwareStatus
| order by ['Product line'] asc, Model asc
content.title: Devices missing firmware (CVE attack surface)

content.query:
let _hostNames = Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where 'value::all' in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend hostId_s = tostring(hostId)
| join kind=leftouter (_hostNames) on $left.hostId_s == $right.hostId
| extend Site = coalesce(FriendlyName, tostring(meta.name), "Unknown")
| extend WanIp = tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp)
| where isnotempty(WanIp)
| summarize ['Distinct IPs'] = make_set(WanIp),
            ['First seen'] = min(TimeGenerated),
            ['Last seen']  = max(TimeGenerated) by Site
| extend ['IP count'] = array_length(['Distinct IPs'])
| where ['IP count'] > 1
| order by ['IP count'] desc
content.title: Sites with multiple WAN IPs in last 30d (DHCP rotation / DDoS signal)

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| extend ['Backup age (days)'] = datetime_diff('day', now(), todatetime(latestBackupTime)),
         ['Console name'] = tostring(reportedState.name)
| project ['Console name'], IP=ipAddress, Type=hostType, Owner=owner, Blocked=isBlocked,
          Registered=registrationTime, ['Last state change']=lastConnectionStateChange,
          ['Latest backup']=latestBackupTime, ['Backup age (days)']
| order by ['Backup age (days)'] desc
content.title: Console/host inventory

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| where todatetime(lastConnectionStateChange) {TimeRange}
| project ['Console']=tostring(reportedState.name), IP=ipAddress,
          ['Last state change']=lastConnectionStateChange, Type=hostType
| order by ['Last state change'] desc
content.title: Console connectivity changes (last selected window)

content.query:
Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| mv-expand controller = userData.controllers
| extend ['Console name'] = tostring(reportedState.name)
| summarize ['Hosts'] = make_set(['Console name']), ['Host count'] = dcount(id) by Controller = tostring(controller)
| order by ['Host count'] desc
content.title: Apps/controllers deployed per host

content.json: Sourced from Unifi_Cloud_Sites_CL, Unifi_Cloud_Devices_CL, Unifi_Cloud_Hosts_CL, Unifi_Cloud_ISPMetrics_CL. Polling cadence: 5 minutes (Sites, Devices, Hosts) / 1 hour (ISP Metrics).
